title: U.K. Police to Reinvestigate Sex Crime Allegations Against Andrew Tate
summary_full: A police force in England said it would look again at allegations against the influencer from 11 years ago. Mr. Tate was not charged in the case and denies any wrongdoing.
summary_public: A police force in England said it would look again at allegations against the influencer from 11 years ago. Mr. Tate was not charged in the case and denies any wrongdoing.
